title: Supreme Court denies relief to Sameer Wankhede but directs time-bound decision on disciplinary proceedings
description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday refused to interfere with a Delhi High Court verdict by which disciplinary proceedings against IRS officer Sameer Wankhede were revived [Sameer Wankhede vs Union of India]However, the Bench of Justices PS Narasimha and Alok Aradhe noted that the Inquiry Officer and Presenting Officer in the disciplinary proceedings were appointed without affording Wankhede sufficient opportunity to respond to the chargesheet.It thus permitted him to represent himself and file his r
